title: Compassion Benchmark Daily Briefing — May 28, 2026
headline: A methodology-dense cycle with a single material score movement: Bolivia falls to 28.4 as President Paz enacts a military-deployment authority law and a fourth death is confirmed, while three new or promoted methodology categories document the most consequential state-conduct patterns currently active at the scale floor.
summary: Bolivia's -2.5 downgrade (30.9 to 28.4) is the only composite movement tonight, but the cycle's analytical weight rests on three methodology outputs spanning the three floor-adjacent entities: Israel, Russia, and Iran. Israel's AUTHORIZED-RESUMPTION-WITH-SYSTEMATIC-DENIAL category captures a pattern distinct from outright blockade: nominal corridor authorization paired with a 59 percent execution-level denial rate. Russia's CIVIC-DEATH-LAW-FOR-DIASPORA category reaches formal promotion status. Iran's NATIONWIDE-INTERNET-BLACKOUT-AS-COVER-FOR-MASS-REPRESSION receives scale-floor ruling status. All three entities are already at or near 0.0; this is precision documentation, not score-movement work. Two sub-dimension Critical entries carry independent signal value: OpenAI's INT dimension falls to 17.5 at net-zero composite — the governance framework published and the safety-word deletion announced in the same window — and Bolivia's ACC dimension breaches 20.0 for the first time in the current crisis arc. Three boundary watches dominate the forward calendar: Hungary's Sulyok outcome (May 31), Oracle's WARN Act window (opens May 30, 0.6pt above Critical), and Anthropic's DC Circuit ruling (timing unknown, band-crossing trigger in both directions).

topSignals.title: Bolivia 30.9 → 28.4 (Delta -2.5): Military Deployment Law Enacted — ACC Dimension Enters Critical
topSignals.description: President Paz enacted a law on May 27 restoring executive authority to deploy armed forces in public streets and simplifying state-of-emergency procedures. Four deaths are now confirmed from blockade-related denial of medical care: oxygen depletion, blocked emergency vehicles, hospital rationing. Clinicas de La Paz hospital oxygen reserves are depleted. The ACC dimension crosses into Critical at 20.0, the first sub-dimension Critical entry for Bolivia in the current crisis arc. The -2.5 composite delta is below the standard 5-point apply threshold but justified by two pre-defined conditions: the institutional escalation event (military-deployment law) and the confirmation of predicted humanitarian harm (four deaths, oxygen depletion). The HUMANITARIAN-BLOCKADE-FIRST-BASELINE-PROTOCOL reassess-on-resolution trigger remains open.

topSignals.title: Israel 0.0 (Floor Confirmed): AUTHORIZED-RESUMPTION-WITH-SYSTEMATIC-DENIAL — New Conduct Sub-Category Established
topSignals.description: A new methodology sub-category formalizes the pattern documented in Israel's post-ceasefire evidence record: nominal corridor authorization paired with a 59 percent execution-level denial rate as documented by OCHA. This is structurally distinct from outright blockade (no authorization) and from ceasefire-period-aid-restriction (authorization with partial delivery). The sub-category requires three conditions: nominal institutional authorization of aid movement; systematic denial at the execution level exceeding 50 percent; and independent humanitarian monitoring documentation of the gap. Post-ceasefire civilian targeting confirmed: As Saftawi family of nine killed; 23 killed at Al Bureij. Israel's score holds at 0.0 floor; the category establishes the framework for assessing analogous conduct patterns in future entities.

topSignals.title: OpenAI 27.5 (Net-Zero Composite): INT Dimension Enters Critical at 17.5 — Governance Framework vs Safety Deletion
topSignals.description: OpenAI's composite holds at 27.5 via a dimension rebalance: AWR and ACT each increase 2.5 on the Frontier Governance Framework publication, while BND and INT each decrease 2.5 on structural mission-safety word deletion and front-group funding confirmation. The INT dimension entering Critical at 17.5 is the AI-labs finding to track: a company can publish a credible governance framework while simultaneously removing safety language from its foundational mission statement. These are not offsetting signals — they are distinct dimensions moving in opposite directions at the same time. The split will eventually resolve in one dominant direction.

topSignals.title: Oracle 20.6 (Boundary Watch): WARN Act Window Opens May 30 — Highest-Probability Band Crossing in Fortune 500
topSignals.description: Oracle at 20.6 Developing sits 0.6 points above the Critical boundary. The WARN Act window opens May 30 — the period during which WARN Act violation confirmation would trigger a scorable event. Class action filings in Washington and Missouri allege Oracle reclassified remote workers to avoid WARN Act notice obligations. The CLASSIFICATION-MANIPULATION-TO-AVOID-LABOR-PROTECTIONS methodology candidate is pre-positioned for promotion upon first adjudication. Oracle is the highest-probability near-term band-crossing candidate in the Fortune 500 index.

topSignals.title: Hungary 50.0 (Boundary Watch): Sulyok Constitutional Confrontation Window Active — May 31 Deadline
topSignals.description: Hungary holds at 50.0 with the Sulyok constitutional confrontation effectively at its deadline. Sulyok refused to resign; Magyar retains the constitutional amendment option via his 141/199 supermajority. Three scoring paths remain pre-committed from the May 27 and May 28 protocols: Sulyok resigns (+1.0 to +1.5), constitutional removal (+0.5 to +1.0), Sulyok survives (-0.5 to -1.0). The outcome is methodologically contested: removing an Orbán-era holdover via supermajority could register as reform completion or governance-negative executive override of constitutional design.

boundaryWatch.trigger: WARN Act window opens May 30; class action filings in Washington and Missouri allege remote-worker reclassification to avoid WARN Act notice obligations.
boundaryWatch.note: Oracle at 20.6 carries the narrowest boundary margin in the current Fortune 500 cluster. The CLASSIFICATION-MANIPULATION-TO-AVOID-LABOR-PROTECTIONS methodology candidate is pre-positioned for promotion upon first adjudication. Monitoring window: May 30 through June 15.

boundaryWatch.trigger: Sulyok compliance deadline — refused to resign; Magyar 16th Amendment constitutional removal process active.
boundaryWatch.note: Three scoring paths pre-committed. The analytical frame for supermajority-use in transitional democracies is genuinely contested; the convention chosen on this event will set precedent for similar situations across other countries in democratic transition.

boundaryWatch.trigger: DC Circuit ruling on Anthropic v. Hegseth — oral arguments complete May 19; court expedited; ruling timing unknown.
boundaryWatch.note: Cycle 9 hold. Favorable ruling: +1.0 to +2.5, Functional/Established crossing possible. Adverse ruling: -1.0 to -2.0. Judge Henderson's 'spectacular overreach' language remains the most specific pre-ruling signal on record.

boundaryWatch.trigger: ICE detention arc continuing; EQU dimension already at Critical (17.5); sub-threshold accumulation ongoing.
boundaryWatch.note: United States at 23.4 carries documented sub-threshold accumulation in the ICE detention arc. EQU in Critical following May 27 apply. The OBBBA Medicaid work requirement (December 2026 implementation) is the next forward-trigger-eligible event.

sectorAlerts.headline: Three floor-entity methodology events in one cycle establish the most precise documentary layer in benchmark history
observations: AUTHORIZED-RESUMPTION-WITH-SYSTEMATIC-DENIAL (Israel): captures nominal compliance paired with 59% execution-level denial — requires a different analytical response than outright blockade, which is why the sub-category matters
CIVIC-DEATH-LAW-FOR-DIASPORA (Russia): formally promoted; requires legislation targeting emigrated nationals, conviction-triggered multi-dimensional deprivation, and speech/political offense basis

NATIONWIDE-INTERNET-BLACKOUT-AS-COVER-FOR-MASS-REPRESSION (Iran): scale-floor ruling applied to the longest documented internet blackout in the modern record concurrent with mass arrests and execution spike
All three entities at or near 0.0 floor; the methodology precision work here will accelerate future assessments of the same conduct patterns in entities not yet at floor

sectorAlerts.headline: OpenAI's INT dimension entering Critical at net-zero composite documents a genuine governance-trajectory bifurcation
observations: The Frontier Governance Framework is the most comprehensive public safety documentation OpenAI has produced; the simultaneous mission-safety word deletion is the most significant structural erosion event in the same cycle
Net-zero composite conceals a split trajectory — the dimension rebalance is the correct instrument but will not show in the composite number
Anthropic holds at 58.1 boundary-watch; the governance quality gap between Anthropic and OpenAI remains substantial but OpenAI's INT erosion is narrowing one key dimension
The two competing OpenAI signals will not net to zero indefinitely — a directional resolution is expected within the next 2-3 assessment cycles

sectorAlerts.headline: Oracle at 0.6pt above Critical is the highest-probability near-term band-crossing candidate in the Fortune 500
observations: Oracle's WARN window opening May 30 at 0.6pt above Critical is the narrowest boundary margin currently active across all Fortune 500 entities
The CLASSIFICATION-MANIPULATION methodology candidate applies to any employer reclassifying workers to reduce statutory protection coverage — a category broader than Oracle alone
UnitedHealth at 11.4 Critical continues accumulating multi-agency regulatory exposure below the Oracle boundary threshold
Amazon at 12.8 Critical carries the NLRB arc; the Eleventh Circuit challenge to NLRB authority is a structural accumulator below apply threshold

methodologyNotes.name: AUTHORIZED-RESUMPTION-WITH-SYSTEMATIC-DENIAL
methodologyNotes.description: New conduct sub-category for situations where a state nominally authorizes aid corridor or service delivery but systematically denies execution at rates exceeding 50 percent, as documented by independent humanitarian monitoring. Structurally distinct from outright blockade (no authorization) and from ceasefire-period-aid-restriction (partial delivery with some authorization failure). Requires: nominal institutional authorization; independent monitoring documentation of the execution gap; denial rate exceeding 50 percent. First application: Israel post-ceasefire period, May 2026.

methodologyNotes.name: CIVIC-DEATH-LAW-FOR-DIASPORA — Formal Promotion
methodologyNotes.description: Permanently promoted methodology category for state legislation extinguishing civic existence of emigrated nationals on political or speech offense grounds. Four required criteria: legislation specifically targeting emigrants; conviction-triggered multi-dimensional deprivation; speech or political offense basis (not violent crime); independent human rights body documentation. Distinct from general expatriate-asset-freeze and from diaspora-surveillance. First application: Russia, May 2026.

methodologyNotes.name: NATIONWIDE-INTERNET-BLACKOUT-AS-COVER-FOR-MASS-REPRESSION
methodologyNotes.description: Scale-floor ruling status applied to state-imposed nationwide internet blackouts lasting 30+ days concurrent with documented mass arrests, lethal force, and structural hardware capacity for repeat deployment. The 88-day Iran blackout meets all criteria and is documented as a component of the composite scale-floor designation. First application: Iran, May 2026.

forwardTriggers.trigger: WARN Act window opens; class action filings in Washington and Missouri allege WARN-avoidance reclassification. Apply warranted if violations confirmed; CLASSIFICATION-MANIPULATION candidate promotion on adjudication.
Sulyok constitutional confrontation outcome — three pre-committed paths: resign (+1.0 to +1.5), constitutional removal (+0.5 to +1.0), survives (-0.5 to -1.0).
DC Circuit ruling on Anthropic v. Hegseth — favorable: +1.0 to +2.5 (crossing possible); adverse: -1.0 to -2.0. Court expedited after May 19 oral arguments.
INT dimension at Critical (17.5) at net-zero composite; governance bifurcation will resolve directionally. Tumbler Ridge failure-to-report arc unresolved at formal apply proximity.
Post-crisis reassessment per HUMANITARIAN-BLOCKADE-FIRST-BASELINE-PROTOCOL; further apply warranted if casualty count exceeds threshold or IACHR/OHCHR formal mechanisms activated.

dailyOpeningQuestion.text: Israel's AUTHORIZED-RESUMPTION-WITH-SYSTEMATIC-DENIAL category documents 59% execution-level denial of authorized aid movements; does the magnitude of execution-denial — rather than authorization-denial — constitute a distinct scoring dimension under the benchmark's BND framework, or does the floor designation absorb this sub-category without composite consequence?
dailyOpeningQuestion.tensionFraming: Nominal authorization and systematic execution-level denial are analytically distinct from outright blockade.
